    1. findLast10Passwords(int)

Interface PasswordHashRecordsREPO

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<PasswordHashRecordsTBL, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<PasswordHashRecordsTBL, Integer>
public interface PasswordHashRecordsREPO extends org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<PasswordHashRecordsTBL, Integer>
Spring Data JPA repository for PasswordHashRecordsTBL entities.

This repository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for password hash records.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PasswordHashRecordsTBL>
    findLast10Passwords(int userloginid)
    Finds the last 10 password hash records for a user.

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository

    count, delete, deleteAll, deleteAll, deleteAllById, deleteById, existsById, findAll, findAllById, findById, save, saveAll

  • Method Details

    • findLast10Passwords

      @Query(value="SELECT * FROM jamiidb.Password_Hash_Records WHERE USER_LOGIN_ID = ? ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 10", nativeQuery=true) List<PasswordHashRecordsTBL> findLast10Passwords(int userloginid)
      Finds the last 10 password hash records for a user.
      Parameters:
      userloginid - the user ID to search for
      Returns:
      list of the last 10 password hash records for the user
